setting: The story takes place in a classroom during a school day.
protagonist: Billy, a student who is anxious about public speaking.
plot_structure: Billy anxiously waits for his turn to present, gives his report nervously, and feels relieved when it is over.
source_story: Billy was very nervous about giving his report in front of the class. The teacher calls the students one right after another. It is Billy's turn. He nervously finishes his speech. He is very relieved now that he is done.

setting: The story takes place in a school during Susan's final year of teaching.
protagonist: Susan, an experienced teacher contemplating retirement.
plot_structure: After enduring a particularly difficult class, Susan decides to retire from teaching.
source_story: Susan was a teacher. She had been thinking about retiring. Susan had a horrible class one year. She realized she didn't want to teach anymore. Susan finally retired.

setting: The story takes place in Shannon's home over the course of several days.
protagonist: Shannon, a pet owner frustrated by her cat's excessive shedding.
plot_structure: Shannon, overwhelmed by her cat's shedding, impulsively shaves the cat after finding a massive fur ball.
source_story: Shannon had a lot of pets. One cat in particular shed a lot. She was tired to sweeping up fur. One day, she discovered a huge fur ball on the floor. She snapped and shaved the cat!

setting: The story takes place in Jose's backyard over the course of a week.
protagonist: Jose, a curious and patient observer.
plot_structure: Jose patiently observes a cocoon in his backyard until he finally witnesses a butterfly emerge.
source_story: Jose discovered a cocoon in his backyard a week ago. Every day he would check on it to see if it would hatch. Today finally seemed to be the day. He stared intently as the cocoon wriggled on the leaf. Slowly but surely, a butterfly emerged.

setting: The story takes place in an unnamed town during Christmas time.
protagonist: Allen, a thoughtful and caring young man.
plot_structure: Allen, unable to afford a gift for his girlfriend, finds unexpected money and is able to buy her the present he wanted.
source_story: Allen was sad on Christmas. He wanted to buy his girlfriend a new phone. He didn't have enough money so he went to buy her flowers. On the way to the florist he found a $100 bill. He picked it up and bought his girlfriend a new phone.

setting: The story takes place in the narrator's home and its surrounding neighborhood in the present day.
protagonist: The main character is the narrator's adventurous and mischievous cat.
plot_structure: A mischievous cat repeatedly disappears and returns with injuries, leading the owner to keep him indoors for his own safety.
source_story: My cat always disappears. Once, he was gone for 5 days! He showed up on the 5th day with some scratches. He was always quick to get into a cat fight. For now, he is under house arrest.

setting: The story takes place in a contemporary home over the course of a week.
protagonist: A concerned spouse seeking remedies for his wife's cough.
plot_structure: A husband seeks both medical and homeopathic remedies for his wife's cough, but her symptoms resolve before the alternative remedy arrives.
source_story: My wife had a bad cough last week. She saw a doctor and got some meds. I asked my homeopathic friend for some remedies. She recommended we buy B&T cough syrup. By the time we got it her cough had gone away.

setting: The story takes place in the present day, primarily in the narrator's personal space as they engage with books and documentaries.
protagonist: An individual who becomes deeply fascinated by historical tragedies.
plot_structure: The narrator becomes obsessed with the Titanic, immerses themselves in related material, and then shifts their focus to another historical tragedy as their interest fades.
source_story: I developed an obsession with the Titanic. I read all the books and started watching documentaries. I felt like I could not get enough. Eventually my interest began to wane. I moved on to reading about the Holocaust.

setting: The story takes place over several days in Anna's yard, specifically at an apple tree.
protagonist: Anna, a curious and observant individual fascinated by nature.
plot_structure: Anna observes a cocoon in her apple tree daily until she witnesses a butterfly emerge, filling her with awe.
source_story: Anna saw a cocoon in her apple tree. She eyed it curiously. She checked on it every day. A few days later she saw something emerging from it. She stared in awe as a beautiful butterfly came out!

setting: A high school football field and Rob's home, during his first high school game.
protagonist: Rob, a young football player recently named star quarterback.
plot_structure: Rob, after being named star quarterback, performs poorly in his first game and retreats home, overwhelmed by self-pity.
source_story: Rob played football since the age of five. In high school, his coach named him the star quarterback. During his first game, the threw three interceptions. The crowd booed him as he walked off the field. Rob went home and wallowed in self pity.

setting: The story takes place in a baby's room during the process of decorating it.
protagonist: The main character is a caregiver or parent preparing a room for their baby.
plot_structure: A caregiver decorates a baby's room with glowing stars and moons, delighting the baby.
source_story: We decorated the baby's room. We painted it pink and lavender. We placed stickers of moons and stars on the ceiling. When we turned off the lights, they glowed. The baby cooed happily as she looked at the ceiling.

setting: The story takes place in an unspecified contemporary setting over several days.
protagonist: Tim, a determined and passionate checkers player.
plot_structure: Tim struggles to win at checkers against a friend, practices diligently, and ultimately succeeds.
source_story: Tim loved to play checkers. One day he met a friend that also liked checkers. The friend beat Tim every time they played. Tim practiced very hard after that. Then, Tim finally beat his friend at checkers.

setting: The story takes place in the present day, primarily at Barry's home.
protagonist: Barry, a consumer who recently acquired a new smartphone.
plot_structure: Barry is frustrated with his phone's battery, orders a battery case, and solves his problem when it arrives.
source_story: Barry got a new smartphone. He was really disappointed by the battery life on his phone. He ordered a battery case off of Amazon. Barry got his new case the next day. The battery case improved his battery life by 24 hours.

setting: The story takes place in Tony's backyard during the holiday season.
protagonist: Tony, a caring but financially struggling individual who owns a pet turkey.
plot_structure: Tony, who loves his pet turkey, ultimately decides to sell it for money despite feeling guilty and sad about his choice.
source_story: Tony had a pet turkey in his backyard. Tony would always feed his turkey and spend time with it. Tony loved his turkey but was very short on money. It was near the holidays and Tony decided to sell his turkey. Tony felt bad for selling his friend to be eaten for money.

setting: The story takes place in Cabo San Lucas over the course of several vacations.
protagonist: Bob and Jane, a couple seeking to enhance their vacation experiences.
plot_structure: Bob and Jane enjoy Cabo, decide to buy a condo with the help of a real estate agent, and end up taking frequent trips to their new vacation home.
source_story: Bob and Jane really enjoyed their last vacation at Cabo San Lucas. They considered buying a condo so they could enjoy Cabo more. On their next trip to Cabo, they visited a local real estate agent. The agent took them around and found them a good place. Bob and Jane now take frequent trips to their vacation home in Cabo.

setting: The story takes place at a lake during the boy's birthday.
protagonist: Susan, a thoughtful woman visiting the lake.
plot_structure: Susan meets a young boy at the lake and gives him a toy boat for his birthday.
source_story: Susan went to the lake. She saw a small boy there. She asked him how old he was. He told her he was 3, and today was his birthday. She gave him a toy boat for his birthday.

setting: A cozy cafe during a storm, ten years after Ron and Hermione last saw each other.
protagonist: Ron and Hermione, two old friends reconnecting after a long separation.
plot_structure: After a decade apart, Ron and Hermione meet in a cafe, exchange compliments, and quietly share tea while a storm rages outside.
source_story: Ron and Hermione reunited for the first time in a decade. Ron complimented Harmony on how fit she'd stayed. Harmony noted how dapper Ron looked. The old friends shared a quiet cup of tea. They sipped their drinks and watched the storm rage outside the cafe.

setting: The story takes place in a contemporary, everyday setting over the course of several months.
protagonist: Tom, a person determined to improve his financial situation by making lifestyle changes.
plot_structure: Tom makes small lifestyle changes to save money and is pleasantly surprised by the results after several months.
source_story: Tom decided he need to save more money. Tom cancelled his cable TV service. Tom also stopped eating out every other night. After several months, Joe looked at his savings. He couldn't believe the difference such small changes can make!

setting: The story takes place in the Ellis family's home during Christmas time.
protagonist: The Ellis family, particularly the youngest son, who is emotionally invested in finding the cat.
plot_structure: The Ellis family searches for their missing cat, only to discover she is safe and sleeping in their Christmas tree.
source_story: The Ellis family couldn't find their cat anywhere. They didn't think she could have gotten outside. They searched and searched, calling for her. The youngest son sat crying in front of the Christmas tree. The he noticed her sleeping high up in the tree!

setting: The story takes place outdoors during the day, likely in a natural environment where rock collecting is possible.
protagonist: James, an enthusiastic outdoors-man and rock collector.
plot_structure: James discovers a valuable topaz while collecting rocks and successfully sells it for profit.
source_story: James was an avid outdoors-man. He collected many things including rocks. One day he found a very bright yellow stone. It was transparent and appeared to be a jewel of some sort. James had found a chunk of topaz and sold it for profit later.

setting: The story takes place in a neighborhood during the present day.
protagonist: Alex, a basketball enthusiast who is shorter than his neighbor.
plot_structure: Alex challenges his taller neighbor to a basketball game, loses easily, and decides not to play with him again.
source_story: Alex likes to play basketball. He challenged his neighbor to a game. The neighbor is much taller than Alex. The neighbor won the game easily. Alex no longer asks his neighbor to play basketball.

setting: The story takes place during Kim's move to a new house, primarily in her car while transporting her belongings.
protagonist: Kim, a person moving to a new home and responsible for packing her possessions.
plot_structure: Kim packs her plates, drives to her new house, hits a bump that breaks her dishes, and regrets not packing them more carefully.
source_story: Kim was moving. She packed all her plates into a box. As she was driving to her new house, she hit a big bump. All the dishes broke! Kim regretting not using more bubble wrap.

setting: The story takes place in a contemporary domestic setting, likely in Jane and her boyfriend's home and a nearby store.
protagonist: Jane, a woman who values specific household items and is particular about her preferences.
plot_structure: Jane asks her boyfriend to buy coat hangers, but he buys the wrong kind, leading to her dissatisfaction and requiring her to fix the mistake herself.
source_story: Jane asked her boyfriend to buy some coat hangers. He didn't really know much about them. He decided to get the cheapest wire hangers he could find. Jane was very displeased with his decision. She had to go back and get the right kind.

setting: The story takes place in a modern-day bank during the daytime.
protagonist: Lee, a determined individual eager to start saving money.
plot_structure: Lee saves money, opens a bank account, and feels excited about his new financial responsibility.
source_story: Lee wanted to open a savings account. He saved up thirty dollars and then went to open the account. They gave him a debit card and helped him sign up. Soon he had his very own account. Lee couldn't wait to start saving!

setting: A modern residential neighborhood during a morning at 10 AM.
protagonist: Hank, a frustrated resident disturbed by his neighbors' frequent parties.
plot_structure: Hank is initially upset by his neighbors' loud party but becomes grateful when the noise helps him wake up in time for work.
source_story: Hank was angry about how often his neighbors would party. They had loud parties at night and even some mornings. Hank angrily woke up at 10 AM to the sound of loud music. But then he remembered he had work in 30 minutes. This time, Hank was happy about his neighbor's party.

setting: The story takes place in a store during the present day.
protagonist: Tom, a man known for his speed and tendency to run everywhere.
plot_structure: Tom rushes through the store to get a drink but ends up tripping and spilling it.
source_story: Tom was a fast man. He ran everywhere, including to the store. He ran down the aisle to get a drink. He turned quickly and started to run. He tripped and spilled the drink everywhere.

setting: The story takes place in a piano teacher's studio during a lesson.
protagonist: Ethan, a student who feels guilty about not practicing piano.
plot_structure: Ethan struggles with his guilt over not practicing, chooses to confess to his teacher, and spends the lesson making up for it.
source_story: Ethan sat at the piano in his teacher's studio. He felt guilty because he had not practiced his assignment. At first he thought he should just pretend that he practiced. He then decided this was wrong and he told his teacher the truth. They spent the entire lesson practicing what he should have done.

setting: The story takes place on a college campus during Van's first day of college.
protagonist: Van, a young man starting his college journey.
plot_structure: Van moves into college with his family's help and they share a supportive dinner together.
source_story: It was Van's first day of college. His parents and brother helped him move in. He brought many things with him from home. After everything was moved in, the family went to dinner together. They talked about the move over pizza.

setting: The story takes place in a modern urban area during the daytime.
protagonist: Tammy, a cyclist navigating city streets.
plot_structure: Tammy is struck by a truck while biking through an intersection and is taken to the hospital after the driver flees.
source_story: Tammy rode her bike. She crossed an intersection. She was hit halfway through. The truck didn't stop to help her. She went to the hospital.

setting: The story takes place in and around Jill's home and school during the daytime.
protagonist: Jill, a thoughtful and sensitive young girl.
plot_structure: Jill rescues a butterfly, makes a card for her teacher, faces an unexpected reaction, and ultimately keeps the card as a personal treasure.
source_story: Jill saw a beautiful butterfly in the grille of her dad's car. She carefully removed the butterfly and pasted it to a card. Jill gave the card to a teacher that she especially admired. When the teacher saw the dead butterfly, she dropped the card. Jill brought the card home and kept it in a box of treasures.

setting: The story takes place in a home and a toy store during the present day.
protagonist: Charlie, a three-year-old child who is upset when his toy is broken.
plot_structure: After Robbie breaks Charlie's toy, Charlie cries, but his father comforts him by taking him to get a better toy.
source_story: Robbie had broken Charlie's toy out of anger. Charlie was only three and he began to cry. Charlie's Dad came over and asked him what the problem was. Charlie showed him the broken toy and pointed to Robbie. Dad picked Charlie up and took him to the store to get a better toy!

setting: The story takes place over several years in the narrator's family home, spanning from the father's youth to his later years.
protagonist: The main character is the narrator's father, a man known for his heavy drinking habits.
plot_structure: A man drinks heavily throughout his life despite warnings, ultimately developing liver disease as a result.
source_story: My dad was a heavy drinker. He could out drink almost anybody. When he was young it did not affect his health to much. His doctor warned him that all that drinking would catch up to him. Now my dad has liver disease caused by heavy drinking.

setting: The story takes place in the present day, moving between Hal's home and a bank.
protagonist: Hal, an individual excited about his new wallet.
plot_structure: Hal buys a new wallet, forgets to transfer his belongings, realizes this at the bank, and returns home to fix his mistake.
source_story: Hal bought a new wallet. He was so happy, he put it inside his pocket right away. When he arrived at the bank, he realized it was empty. He had to go back home. And he transferred all his papers and money in his new wallet.

setting: The story takes place at a church during a performance event.
protagonist: Rachel and Joe, two nervous singers preparing for a duet.
plot_structure: Rachel and Joe nervously perform a duet at church and receive applause from the congregation.
source_story: Rachel and Joe were singing together. They were going to perform a duet at church. When it was time to go, they took the stage nervously. They sang as good as they could. The congregation all applauded.

setting: The story takes place in Molly's home during the evening after dinner.
protagonist: Molly, a well-behaved and polite child who loves ice cream.
plot_structure: Molly politely asks her mom for ice cream, feels disappointed when her mom leaves, but is delighted when her mom returns with a giant bowl of ice cream.
source_story: Molly really liked ice cream. Molly behaved very well all day and was very polite. After dinner, Molly asked her mom if she could have some ice cream. Her mom simply left the room and Molly was disappointed. But Molly's mom returned with a giant bowl of ice cream!

setting: A city park or neighborhood path shortly after a rainstorm, during the day.
protagonist: Jane, an individual out for a jog.
plot_structure: Jane goes jogging after the rain, slips on wet leaves, breaks her leg, and calls for an ambulance.
source_story: Jane was jogging. It had just rained. The ground was slippery with leaves. She slipped on one and broke her leg. She had to call an ambulance for help.

setting: Fred's home, at night while watching TV.
protagonist: Fred, a person relaxing at home watching his favorite TV series.
plot_structure: Fred falls asleep watching TV, is disturbed by a malfunctioning DVD, feels creeped out, and turns off the TV before going back to sleep.
source_story: Fred was watching his favorite TV series on DVD. He fell asleep while it was still on. Suddenly he was awoken in the night by a skipping scene. The TV was repeating the same two seconds over and over. Fred was thoroughly creeped out, shut off the TV and went to sleep.

setting: A contemporary urban or suburban area during the daytime, near a flight of stairs.
protagonist: Anthony, a skateboarder who enjoys taking risks.
plot_structure: Anthony attempts a risky skateboarding maneuver near stairs, trips on a rail, falls, and is unable to get up for several minutes while the narrator comes to his aid.
source_story: Anthony was riding on his skateboard. He decided to speed up when moving near a flight of stairs. However, he tripped on a side rail and fell on his face. I ran to him to find out what happened. He couldn't get up for a few minutes.

setting: The story takes place in the woods during Derek's first hunting trip with his father.
protagonist: Derek, a young boy experiencing his first hunting trip.
plot_structure: Derek goes hunting with his father, faces his nerves, successfully shoots his first buck, and achieves a rite of passage.
source_story: Derek was excited to go hunting with his dad. This was his first time he was old enough to go. Derek and his dad spotted a young buck in the woods. Derek nervously went to shoot the buck. Derek hit him spot on and collected his first buck.

setting: The story takes place in Sarah and Tom's house during a game of hide and seek, specifically focusing on the basement.
protagonist: Sarah, a young girl who is afraid of the basement but determined to find her brother.
plot_structure: Sarah searches for her hiding brother, confronts her fear of the basement, and feels proud after finding him.
source_story: Sarah and her brother Tom were playing hide and seek. Tom was hiding but Sarah couldn't find him anywhere. She had looked everywhere except the basement, which she feared. Facing her fears, she tiptoed down the stairs. She found him and was proud to have been brave!

setting: The story takes place in a contemporary, everyday setting over the course of eight years.
protagonist: Jason, a persistent man who dreams of wealth and happiness.
plot_structure: Jason spends years buying lottery tickets, finally wins a huge jackpot, but discovers that wealth does not bring him the happiness he expected.
source_story: Jason had always wanted to be rich and happy. He bought lottery tickets every week for years to try and get rich. After 8 years, Jason won the jackpot with his numbers. Jason won twenty million pounds. Although he was now rich, he didn't feel as happy as he hoped.

setting: The story takes place in a contemporary, unspecified urban environment over a short period of time.
protagonist: Timothy, a man juggling multiple romantic relationships.
plot_structure: Timothy ends relationships with all but one girlfriend, only to be left alone when the last girlfriend also leaves him.
source_story: Timothy had too many girlfriends. He decided to break up with all but one of them. They all cried when he told them. Then, the girlfriend he stayed with broke up with him. Now Timothy had no girlfriend.

setting: The story takes place on a beach during the daytime.
protagonist: Fred, a hungry child who has been playing on the beach.
plot_structure: Fred loses his sandwich to a seagull but is comforted when his dad shares his own sandwich with him.
source_story: Fred was starving when his dad handed him a sandwich. He had been playing on the beach all morning. Just as he was about to take a bite it disappeared. A seagull had grabbed it right out of his hand. His dad shared his sandwich with him.

setting: The story takes place at a wine tasting party in the present day.
protagonist: Bri, a person who is hesitant about wine but open to new experiences.
plot_structure: Bri reluctantly attends a wine tasting party and unexpectedly enjoys herself due to engaging conversation.
source_story: Bri was invited to a wine tasting party. She agreed to go even though she did not much like wine. To her surprise though, she had a good time! There was more conversation than wine! Bri was glad she had given it a chance.

setting: The story takes place in Kenny's home over the course of a single day.
protagonist: Kenny, a cookie-loving individual who enjoys baking.
plot_structure: Kenny bakes cookies, his brother eats them all, Kenny is disappointed, but he bakes more cookies when he returns home.
source_story: Kenny loves chocolate chip cookies. He baked a batch before work. His brother ate them all while Kenny was gone. Kenny was disappointed when he found out. He baked a new batch when he got home that night.

setting: A contemporary urban environment, likely during a financial hardship.
protagonist: A man struggling with financial difficulties and regret over his past decisions.
plot_structure: A man pawns his valuables for much less than he hoped, feels disappointed, and resolves to manage his money better.
source_story: The guy needed cash. He took his most valuable possessions to the pawn shop. They gave him a hundred dollars for everything. The guy was disappointed in himself. He swore he would be better with his money in the future.

setting: The story takes place in the mountains during the Christmas season.
protagonist: The Smith family, a group seeking a Christmas tree together.
plot_structure: The Smith family finds a Christmas tree with a bird's nest and chooses to leave it unharmed, selecting another tree instead.
source_story: The Smith family went to the mountains to cut a fresh Christmas tree. They finally found the perfect one. Mister Smith was about to chop it down when they heard chirping. There was a bird's nest in the tree. They picked a back up tree to take home.

setting: The story takes place in the contemporary digital world, primarily within online communities and websites.
protagonist: Kevin, a freelance writer passionate about arcade games.
plot_structure: Kevin's passion for arcade games leads him to write a popular article, gain recognition, and eventually establish his own journal.
source_story: Kevin wrote freelance articles for websites. Kevin wrote about an arcade game he liked. Kevin's article became the definitive source on the game. Kevin became a voice in the arcade community. Kevin was able to start his own journal with his notoriety.

setting: A modern-day coffee shop over several days.
protagonist: Sarah, a coffee shop patron who enjoys iced mochas.
plot_structure: Sarah discovers her favorite coffee is expensive but continues to buy it daily because she enjoys it so much.
source_story: Sarah was at a coffee shop. And she ordered an iced mocha. But after she paid for it, she realized it was $6. It tasted amazing, however. And Sarah ordered the $6 coffee every day.

setting: The story takes place in Tom's bedroom over several mornings.
protagonist: Tom, a person eager to remember his dreams.
plot_structure: Tom follows his friend's advice to record his dreams and succeeds in remembering them better.
source_story: Tom wanted to remember his dreams better. His friend suggested he write them down after waking. Tom bought a pen and paper to leave by his bedside. Tom began writing notes about his dreams upon awakening. Tom was pleased he was able to remember his dreams better.

setting: A public place, likely a café or cafeteria, during an unspecified time.
protagonist: A solitary boy who feels isolated despite being offered company.
plot_structure: A lonely boy is invited to join a crowd but declines, deepening his sense of isolation.
source_story: The boy sat at the table. He was alone. The crowd at a nearby table invited the boy over. The boy refused. The boy felt lonely.

setting: The story takes place in a contemporary office environment during the day of Charles' job interview.
protagonist: Charles, a conscientious job seeker influenced by his father's advice.
plot_structure: Charles follows his father's advice to shine his shoes, which unexpectedly becomes the deciding factor in him being hired for a job.
source_story: Charles' father told him it was important to shine his shoes. Charles didn't see why, but he always kept his shoes shined. One afternoon, Charles interviewed for a management position. Charles was hired, but his boss said competition was close. He told Charles he was hired because the boss liked his shined shoes.

setting: The story takes place in Anna's backyard during the present day.
protagonist: Anna, a person who enjoys observing and helping birds.
plot_structure: Anna notices birds in her backyard, decides to feed them, buys seed, fills her feeders, and is rewarded by many colorful birds visiting.
source_story: Anna saw a lot of birds in her backyard. She decided to feed them. She bought a big bag of seed. Then she filled her feeders with it. Soon many colorful birds were coming to eat!

setting: The story takes place in Sharon's home and at her favorite burger restaurant over the course of about a month in the present day.
protagonist: Sharon, a woman attempting to change her diet by becoming a vegetarian.
plot_structure: Sharon tries to become a vegetarian, struggles for a month, and ultimately returns to eating meat, finding joy in her decision.
source_story: Sharon decided to become a vegetarian. She threw all of the meat in her refrigerator away. The next 3 weeks were tough on her. After a month she decided it was best to go back to eating meat. Sharon went to her favorite burger joint and was in heaven.

setting: The story takes place during lunchtime at an Italian restaurant in the present day.
protagonist: Sally, a compassionate diner who observes and responds to the struggles of her waiter.
plot_structure: Sally overhears her waiter's financial troubles and responds with a generous tip, which the waiter gratefully receives.
source_story: Sally was having lunch by herself at an Italian restaurant. She overheard her waiter having money problems. Sally felt very bad for her waiter. After her meal, Sally tipped her $100. The waiter was very grateful for the tip.

setting: The story takes place in the present day, primarily at the protagonist's home during their spare time.
protagonist: An adult parent seeking ways to earn extra income.
plot_structure: Encouraged by their son, the protagonist tries online microtasks, persists through slow beginnings, and ultimately succeeds in earning significant extra money.
source_story: My son told me about making a little extra money in my spare time. I looked into it and found that it could be very interesting. I started out by turking 10 days in a row and making about 30 cents. I kept at it doing a little every day and things began to add up. Now I turk almost every day and am making a lot of extra money.

setting: The story takes place on a highway during Martha's drive to visit her mother.
protagonist: Martha, a woman traveling by car to see her mother.
plot_structure: Martha's car breaks down on the highway, forcing her to call a tow truck while en route to visit her mother.
source_story: Martha was driving on the highway. She was on the way to see her mother. Smoke started pouring out of her car. She pulled over on the side of the road. She had to call a tow truck to get her car towed.

setting: The story takes place in a contemporary urban or suburban environment over the course of a single day.
protagonist: Tom, a lighthearted and impulsive individual seeking a bit of fun.
plot_structure: Tom wins money on a scratch off ticket, tries his luck again, but doesn't win a second time.
source_story: Tom was in a playful mood. He decided to buy a scratch off ticket. Tom wound up winning a hundred bucks. Tom decided to buy a couple more tickets. He didn't win anything on those, though.

setting: The story takes place in a contemporary suburban neighborhood over the course of a day and night.
protagonist: Anthony, a young man whose actions inadvertently cause concern for his mother.
plot_structure: Anthony visits a girl's house without informing his mother, leading her to believe he is missing, but his friend eventually brings him home, resolving the misunderstanding.
source_story: Anthony went to a girl's house. But his mother thought he ran away. Anthony was supposed to travel to Mexico the following day. Therefore Anthony's mom reported him missing. Anthony's friend picked him up and took him home.

setting: The story takes place at Tommy's school and in the parking lot, during the afternoon after school.
protagonist: Tommy, a young boy eager to get a puppy.
plot_structure: Tommy is disappointed when his mom doesn't pick him up early for a puppy, but is surprised and delighted to find a dog waiting for him after school.
source_story: Tommy was angrily staring at the clock. His mom was supposed to get him out of school so he could get a puppy. She didn't show up. After School she was parked outside waiting. When he stomped to the car to yell he saw a dog on the front seat.

setting: The story takes place on a beach during the daytime, followed by several days afterward.
protagonist: Julie, a woman who visits the beach and experiences the consequences of sunbathing without protection.
plot_structure: Julie falls asleep sunbathing at the beach, suffers a painful sunburn, and learns to always wear sunscreen in the future.
source_story: Julie went to the beach. She fell asleep while sun tanning. She got a terrible sunburn. Her skin was very painful for several days. She always wore sunscreen after that day.

setting: The story takes place in a bustling market in India during the present day.
protagonist: Adam, a curious traveler eager to experience local culture.
plot_structure: Adam travels to India, seeks out a snake charmer with the help of a local, and is delighted when he finally witnesses the spectacle.
source_story: Adam went to India. He wanted to see a snake charmer. He asked a local for directions. Arriving at the market, he gaped in awe. Adam was thrilled to see a snake charmer in real life!

setting: The story takes place at a skatepark during the daytime.
protagonist: John, a skateboard enthusiast who enjoys challenging himself on ramps.
plot_structure: John injures himself attempting a difficult skateboarding trick, but receives help from a friend who takes him to the hospital.
source_story: John was skateboarding at the skatepark. He liked to go off the ramps. This time he went off the large half pipe. When he landed his skateboard cracked and he twisted his ankle. His friend was able to give him a ride to the hospital.

setting: Outside a bar at night in a contemporary urban setting.
protagonist: Tom, a young man out socializing with friends.
plot_structure: Tom is denied entry to a bar by a bouncer due to his expired license, separating him from his friends.
source_story: Tom was out with friends. They were going into a bar. Tom was stopped by the bouncer. His license was expired. They didn't let him in.

setting: The story takes place in the family's backyard over the course of several weeks.
protagonist: A family working together to start and tend a garden.
plot_structure: A family starts a backyard garden, diligently cares for it, and is rewarded by seeing new plants grow.
source_story: Weeks ago, my family and I began and garden in our backyard. We plowed the dirt into furrows and places various seeds inside. Every day, we'd water the dirty and check the ground for weeds. Slowly but surely, little sprouts began to emerge from the ground. Our family was in awe about how our hard work produced new life.

setting: The story takes place in an unspecified location during a lecture or sermon.
protagonist: Bob, a persuasive and zealous speaker.
plot_structure: Bob delivers an impassioned lecture that inspires his audience to become suicide bombers.
source_story: Bob stood in front of the lectern and lectured. He talked about the might and glory of a deity. Bob's audience listened with rapt attention and swayed. After Bob was done, they all left, inspired. Bob had convinced more innocents to become suicide bombers.

setting: The story takes place in a modern workplace over a period of several weeks or months.
protagonist: Candace, an employee who feels isolated and seeks to improve her relationships at work.
plot_structure: Candace feels ignored at work, learns from a friend that she seems arrogant, changes her behavior, and is eventually accepted by her colleagues.
source_story: Candace wondered why everyone ignored her at work. She asked her one friend if she was doing something off putting. Her friend told her she came off as arrogant. Candace took the advice to heart and made changes to her personality. eventually people at work warmed up to Candace.

setting: The story takes place in the present day, likely in Sue's home and adoption agencies.
protagonist: Sue, a determined woman struggling with infertility.
plot_structure: Sue struggles with infertility, explores adoption, and finds hope in the possibility of adopting a child.
source_story: Sue has been trying to have kids for years. She has been unsuccessful with everything she has tried. She started to look into adoption. She found one child that was a perfect fit. She hopes to adopt her by next year.

setting: The story takes place in a fancy grocery store during a shopping trip.
protagonist: Lucy, a curious and eager child experiencing new treats with her grandmother.
plot_structure: Lucy visits a fancy grocery store with her grandma, is tempted by many bakery treats, and ultimately chooses a cannoli.
source_story: Lucy's grandma wanted to buy a cake. They were shopping at the fancy grocery store her grandma liked. Lucy's eyes grew when she saw the bakery. The racks were lined with delicate treats she had never seen. Lucy wanted to try everything, but settled on a cannoli.

setting: The story takes place outdoors during a friendly race between two friends, likely in the present day.
protagonist: Tim, a competitive and energetic individual who initiates a race with his friend.
plot_structure: Tim challenges his friend to a race, but is forced to stop when he pulls a muscle while running.
source_story: Tim challenges his friend to a race. His friend agrees. The race begins. While running Tim slows down and stops. He had pulled a muscle running.

setting: The story takes place in a family home and at a formal event, over the course of two days.
protagonist: A father who is playful with his children but must also fulfill professional duties.
plot_structure: A father injures himself while playing with his kids and feels self-conscious about his appearance while hosting an important event the next day.
source_story: My dad had a big event he had to host. The night before he was playing with us in the house. He gave himself a rug burn on his face trying to do a flip. The burn was so bad he needed a bandaid. He was self conscious the whole time he was hosting the event.

setting: A contemporary city street during the daytime.
protagonist: Martha, an ordinary woman going about her day.
plot_structure: Martha loses her credit card down a sewer while trying to buy ice cream and must replace it.
source_story: Martha was walking down the street by the curb. Martha heard the ice cream truck. She opened her purse to take out some money. Her credit card fell out of her purse and into the sewer. Martha has to get a new credit card now.

setting: The story takes place in a Marshall's store during the present day.
protagonist: Amy, a diligent and friendly cashier.
plot_structure: Amy consistently treats customers kindly, is praised by a customer, and receives recognition from her boss.
source_story: Amy was a cashier at Marshall's She worked hard and was nice to the customers. Amy made it a point to ask how the customers day was going. One day a lady told Amy's boss she was a great worker. Her boss told her he was pleased with her progress.

setting: The story takes place during a vacation in Florida in the present day.
protagonist: Joel, a vacationer traveling with his brothers.
plot_structure: Joel and his brothers go on vacation to Florida, but Joel breaks his leg on the first day, forcing him to end his trip early.
source_story: Joel and his brothers took a vacation. They decided to go to Florida. They had a lot planned for the trip. On the first day Joel fell off a water ski. He broke his leg and had to end his trip early.

setting: The story takes place in John's home over the course of an evening before a school day.
protagonist: John, a diligent and responsible student.
plot_structure: John works hard on his essay, his dog destroys it, and after explaining to his teacher, he is believed due to his good reputation.
source_story: John spent hours writing his English essay that was due the next day. After dinner he went back to his room to finish it. He found a pile of wet and shredded paper on the floor near his dog. John had to tell his teacher that the dog ate his homework. John was usually a very good student so his teacher believed him.

setting: The story takes place in Anna's family home over several generations.
protagonist: Anna, a woman who cherishes memories of her parents through music.
plot_structure: Anna copes with missing her parents by playing their songs on the piano, which becomes a cherished heirloom passed down through her family after her death.
source_story: Anna missed her parents very often. Anna played songs on the piano they used to play for her. The piano in her home stayed with her as she got old. Her kids played it eventually, and continued after she died too. The piano was passed on to their children eventually as well.

setting: The story takes place in a suburban neighborhood during an unspecified present time.
protagonist: Rex, the family dog who is loved by his owners.
plot_structure: A beloved family dog bonds with neighboring children and ultimately leaves his original family to live with them, prompting his owners to accept his happiness elsewhere.
source_story: Rex was our family dog. The entire family love playing with Rex. Two kids from next door came over to play with our dog. Shortly after Rex no longer wanted to live with us. We decided that Rex would be more happy with the kids.

setting: The story takes place at a conference during the day of Ronald's keynote speech.
protagonist: Ronald, an honored but nervous keynote speaker.
plot_structure: Ronald, anxious about his keynote speech, loses his notes but discovers his preparation allows him to succeed without them.
source_story: Ronald was chosen as a keynote speaker at a conference. Ronald was honored but also very nervous. Ronald spent hours and hours preparing his speech. The day of the speech Ronald realized that he lost his notes! Since he had practiced so much he didn't need them after all.

setting: The story takes place in Tommy's home during a visit from his cousin, in the present day.
protagonist: Tommy, a lively three-year-old boy who is attached to his favorite toy.
plot_structure: Tommy struggles with sharing his toy when his cousin visits, but after being scolded by his mother, he learns to wait his turn and share.
source_story: Tommy was a lively three year old boy. He had a favorite toy that he always played with. One day his cousin came over and Tommy didn't want to share his toy. His mother was very upset and scolded Tommy. Tommy realized that he had to share and waited for his turn.

setting: The story takes place at a zoo during Erica's first day as a penguin keeper.
protagonist: Erica, a new and inexperienced zoo keeper assigned to care for the penguins.
plot_structure: Erica, on her first day as a penguin keeper, prepares and delivers food for the penguins.
source_story: Erica was the new zoo keeper for the penguins. It was her first day at the job. Her first assignment was to feed the penguins. She prepared buckets full of fish. She left the buckets of fish near the penguins.

setting: The story takes place in a cooking class in the present day.
protagonist: Ella, a reluctant cooking student who struggles with cooking.
plot_structure: Ella struggles in a cooking class, burns her food, quits, and resumes ordering takeout.
source_story: Ella was taking a cooking class. She really didn't like the class. Ella burned all her food. Ella eventually quit the class. She continued to order take out.

setting: The story takes place in a modern school over the course of a few days.
protagonist: Mary, a diligent student who is used to getting good grades.
plot_structure: Mary fails a test, feels upset, but after asking her teacher for another chance, she is allowed to retake it.
source_story: Mary had always gotten good grades in school, but failed a test. She was sad when she saw she had been given a F. Mary cried when she saw the bad grade. Mary asked the teacher if she could take the test again. The teacher agreed and let her take the test again for a better grade.

setting: A contemporary grocery store during the day.
protagonist: Kate, a woman who goes out casually dressed to run a quick errand.
plot_structure: Kate makes a quick trip to the store in casual attire and is judged by her friends for her appearance.
source_story: Kate needed to buy some toilet paper. She didn't bother to get fully dressed or done up. She figured she'd be in and out in no time. At the store Kate ran into several friends. They all judged her based on her looks.

setting: The story takes place in a contemporary home environment, shortly before a game.
protagonist: Jazz, a young person eager to buy a shirt for an upcoming game.
plot_structure: Jazz wants a shirt for a game but, after being denied an advance by his mom, must save up his own money to buy it.
source_story: Jazz wanted a shirt for the game. He did not have enough in his account. He asked his mom for an advance on his allowance. She said no. Jazz had to save until he had enough.

setting: A bank during the daytime in the present.
protagonist: Gene, a man making a deposit at the bank.
plot_structure: Gene visits a bank, interacts with a teller, and successfully asks her out after a brief, friendly exchange.
source_story: Gene walked up to the window to deposit the money into his account. A woman asked him to fill out the deposit slip. Mike did as she said and handed her the money and the slip. They both traded glances and smiles. Gene asked her out and she said yes.

setting: The story takes place in Tom's apartment and a fast food restaurant, in the present day.
protagonist: Tom, a hungry individual seeking a simple meal.
plot_structure: Tom, hungry and unwilling to cook, gathers spare change and buys fast food to satisfy his hunger.
source_story: Tom was hungry. He didn't want to cook. He scrounged up some change around his apartment. Tom was able to get some fast food. It wasn't much but it filled him up.

setting: The story takes place in the present day, centered around a dance recital event.
protagonist: Dori, a dancer who values her friendship with Hannah.
plot_structure: Dori invites Hannah to her recital, Hannah initially refuses, realizes her mistake, apologizes, and attends, strengthening their friendship.
source_story: Dori invited her friend Hannah to her dance recital. Hannah said she didn't want to go out of pure laziness. Dori was incredibly hurt by Hannah's refusal to attend. Hannah realized the error of her ways and apologized to Dori. Hannah attended the dance recital and enjoyed watching her friend.

setting: The story takes place during the day in the ocean while Joe is scuba diving.
protagonist: Joe, an adventurous scuba diver.
plot_structure: Joe enjoys scuba diving, encounters a threatening shark, escapes unharmed, and feels grateful.
source_story: Joe went scuba diving. He saw many beautiful fish. Then he spotted a shark cruising his way! Joe hurried back up to the boat. He was grateful that the shark hadn't attacked!

setting: The story takes place inside a house at night.
protagonist: A dog who is sleeping in bed.
plot_structure: A dog is kicked off the bed by her owner for snoring, feels sad, and goes downstairs.
source_story: The dog was asleep in bed. She started snoring. Her owner kicked her off. The dog cried. The dog went downstairs.

setting: The story takes place in the competitive world of online first-person shooter (FPS) gaming, in the present day.
protagonist: Grubbs Gravy, a creative and ambitious FPS team strategist.
plot_structure: Grubbs Gravy leads his team to victory with innovative strategies, earning a professional contract and beginning a new career.
source_story: Grubbs Gravy was a strat caller for his FPS team. He challenged the reigning champions at a match of 6vs6. Grubbs employed never before seen strategies to confuse his enemies. So good were his strats that he landed a contract with a pro team. Now Grubbs battles for cash on the daily.

setting: The story takes place in Don's home and an aquarium store in the present day.
protagonist: Don, a young boy eager to have a pet fish.
plot_structure: Don wants a pet fish, earns the responsibility to buy it himself, and successfully sets up a mini aquarium at home.
source_story: Don asked his mom for a pet fish. She told him that he had to buy it with his own money. He went to the aquarium store and picked out a goldfish. He bought a fish bowl and some food for it. He took it home and set up a mini aquarium.

setting: The story takes place in an office during the protagonist's first day in a new cubicle.
protagonist: An office worker who appreciates privacy and comfort in their workspace.
plot_structure: The protagonist moves into a larger, more private cubicle, feels happy about the change, and begins work with a sense of satisfaction.
source_story: My new cubicle was larger than the last one. I sat down smiling happily at my newfound privacy. My neighbors couldn't see over the cubicle when they tried. I knew then that I was going to like this job. I sat back with my coffee and got to work, smiling.

setting: The story takes place in a kitchen during an unspecified time.
protagonist: Randy, a person hurriedly washing dishes.
plot_structure: Randy rushes through washing dishes, accidentally throws a plate, and breaks it.
source_story: Randy was doing the dishes. And he wanted to finish as quickly as possible. The plates were very slippery. And he ended up throwing one into the air. It landed on the floor and broke.

setting: The story takes place in a contemporary family home over the course of Allie's twelfth birthday.
protagonist: Allie, a twelve-year-old girl eager to fit in with her peers.
plot_structure: Allie persistently asks her parents for an iPhone like her friends, and after much pleading, her parents finally give in and buy her one.
source_story: Allie just turned twelve. She really wanted an iphone. All her friends had one. So she begged her parents relentlessly. Finally they said yes and gave her one.

setting: The story takes place at the narrator's home in the present day, after a trip to a costume store.
protagonist: A mischievous child who plans a prank with friends.
plot_structure: A group of friends buy scary costumes to prank the narrator's brother, but he retaliates angrily after being frightened.
source_story: My friends and I scared my brother today. We went to the costume store to buy scary outfits. When we came home, we put them on and waited. When my brother came home, we jumped out and scared him. He was so mad, he beat us all up.

setting: A modern high school classroom during a typical school day.
protagonist: A knowledgeable paraeducator who assists in the classroom.
plot_structure: A paraeducator feels isolated and apologetic after realizing they are the only one who knows the answer to a vocabulary question that stumps both a teacher and an assistant principal.
source_story: I work as a paraeducator in a high school. A teacher there has the students answer an SAT question every class. One day the answer to the vocabulary question was disconsolate. The teacher and the assistant principal were unsure of the answer. I was appalled, but felt like I had to apologize for knowing.

setting: A contemporary neighborhood during the daytime.
protagonist: A young person exploring with friends, motivated by curiosity and kindness.
plot_structure: A group of friends discovers an abandoned house, cleans it up, and receives recognition from the local newspaper.
source_story: My friends and I were exploring my neighborhood. We found an abandoned house. It was very unkempt. We cleaned up the outside as best as we could. The local newspaper wrote a story about our good deed!

setting: The story takes place at night in Mindy's home, specifically as she gets out of bed for a glass of water.
protagonist: Mindy, a person with a strong fear of roaches and an active imagination.
plot_structure: Mindy, already afraid of roaches, encounters one at night and is so frightened she nearly faints.
source_story: Mindy was scared of roaches. She thought they would one day take over the world. One day she got out of bed for a glass of water. She saw a roach on the floor. Mindy nearly fainted.

setting: The story takes place in a modern-day town during late morning to early afternoon.
protagonist: Joe, a hungry individual craving breakfast food.
plot_structure: Joe craves breakfast after the usual time, but finds a fast food place that serves it and enjoys pancakes for lunch.
source_story: Joe was really hungry. He wanted some breakfast food. Unfortunately it was past 11 AM. Then Joe remembered some fast food places still served breakfast. He wound up eating pancakes for lunch.

setting: A restaurant during a typical workday.
protagonist: A restaurant server dealing with a difficult customer.
plot_structure: A server deals with an unreasonable customer, apologizes despite feeling wronged, and internally wishes they could speak up.
source_story: I had a terrible customer at the restaurant today. She asked for a bottle of wine. When I brought the bottle of wine, she complained about the long wait. Although it had not been long at all, I apologized. Instead, I wish I could have told her that she was rude.
